introSection: Air Grover is a steel roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Tampa in Tampa, Florida, USA. The ride is themed around the Sesame Street character "Grover". It was built by Zierer and opened on March 27, 2010. The ride is the same off-the-shelf product as Grover's Alpine Express, which opened the previous year at sister park Busch Gardens Williamsburg.

fullText:
Air Grover is a steel roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Tampa in Tampa, Florida, USA. The ride is themed around the Sesame Street character "Grover". It was built by Zierer and opened on March 27, 2010. The ride is the same off-the-shelf product as Grover's Alpine Express, which opened the previous year at sister park Busch Gardens Williamsburg.

Air Grover is a 190 installation from the Force line of roller coasters built by Germany company Zierer.

On the front car, there is the head of Grover.
